nasb.text: So it will be, if you go with us, that whatever good the Lord does for us, we will do for you.”

esv.text: And if you do go with us, whatever good the Lord will do to us, the same will we do to you.”

cnv.text: 如果你與我們同去，將來耶和華用甚麼好處待我們，我們也必用甚麼好處待你。”

ccb.text: 如果你跟我们同去，我们一定与你分享耶和华赐给我们的福气。”
